source_old_req: The State_Machine component's State_Out port shall consistently output the same value as its previous output value, beginning with an initial value of 0, as guaranteed by the system-level specification. In the State_Machine.impl implementation, the subcomponent Sub_State_Machine.Impl must be connected to the State_Out port via immediate communication, ensuring that all state signals generated by the substate machine are transmitted without loss to the system boundary through the SMToSSM data flow.
natural_requirement: The State_Machine component shall define the implementation-level data routing and execution constraints for State_Machine.Impl. In the implementation layer, State_Machine.Impl shall route the signal flow from SSM.State_Out to State_Out through SMToSSM. Additionally, State_Machine.Impl shall use immediate communication timing on connection SMToSSM.

requirement_items.text: The State_Machine.Impl implementation shall route the signal flow from SSM.State_Out to State_Out through connection SMToSSM.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The State_Machine.Impl implementation shall declare connection SMToSSM from SSM.State_Out to State_Out.

requirement_items.text: The State_Machine.Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection SMToSSM.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The State_Machine.Impl implementation shall assign Communication_Properties::Timing on connection SMToSSM as immediate.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The State_Machine.Impl implementation shall declare connection SMToSSM from SSM.State_Out to State_Out. The State_Machine.Impl implementation shall assign Communication_Properties::Timing on connection SMToSSM as immediate.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The State_Machine.Impl implementation shall route the signal flow from SSM.State_Out to State_Out through connection SMToSSM. The State_Machine.Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection SMToSSM.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
